title: ocimum nummularia
intro: Ocimum nummularia, also known as money mint or African basil, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ocimum nummularia include relief from digestive issues, reduction of fever, and alleviation of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or essential oils, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
